title: The Rendering of Allegiance to Marwan b. al-Hakam in Syria
description: b. al-Hakam in Syria According to al-Hdrith-Ibn Sa°d-Muhammad b. cUmar:236 When the oath of allegiance was given to °Abdalli h b. al227. According to Ansdb, lVb, tot', he was called duhrujat a1-ju°al because of his shortness. 228. On him see Ell, s.v.; GAS. II, 324. 229. Cf. Ansdb, lVb, iota, V, 191's; "Zayd" is sometimes identified as a mawla of Ibn Masud; " cure the widows of" may refer to their amorous infatuation with the governor. 230. Ar.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 20
